title: [InstCombine] Propagate poison pow[i], [us]add, [us]sub and [us]mul

tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double, i32) #0

define void @powi(double %V, ptr %P) {
  %B = tail call double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %V, i32 0) #1
  store volatile double %B, ptr %P, align 8
  %C = tail call double @llvm.powi.f64.i32(double %V, i32 1) #1
  store volatile double %C, ptr %P, align 8
  ret void
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.powi.f32.i16(float, i16) #0

define void @powi_i16(float %V, ptr %P) {
  %B = tail call float @llvm.powi.f32.i16(float %V, i16 0) #1
  store volatile float %B, ptr %P, align 4
  %C = tail call float @llvm.powi.f32.i16(float %V, i16 1) #1
  store volatile float %C, ptr %P, align 4
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.sadd.sat.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @sadd_scalar_poison(i8 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sadd_scalar_poison(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 -1
  %y5 = call i8 @llvm.sadd.sat.i8(i8 %a, i8 poison)
  ret i8 %y5
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.sadd.sat.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @sadd_scalar_poison_commute(i8 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sadd_scalar_poison_commute(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 -1
  %y6 = call i8 @llvm.sadd.sat.i8(i8 poison, i8 %a)
  ret i8 %y6
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.sadd.sat.i8(i8, i8) #0

; CHECK-LABEL: @sadd_scalar_undef(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 -1
  %y5 = call i8 @llvm.sadd.sat.i8(i8 %a, i8 undef)
  ret i8 %y5
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare <2 x i8> @llvm.sadd.sat.v2i8(<2 x i8>, <2 x i8>) #0

define <2 x i8> @sadd_vector_poison(<2 x i8> %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @sadd_vector_poison(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i8> splat (i8 -1)
  %y5v = call <2 x i8> @llvm.sadd.sat.v2i8(<2 x i8> %a, <2 x i8> poison)
  ret <2 x i8> %y5v
